description: Los Ciclones is a faction of the Gulf Cartel, a Mexican drug cartel, created in 2015. It operates primarily in the border region between Matamoros, Tamaulipas, and Brownsville, Texas, as well as in Nuevo León, Tamaulipas, and San Luis Potosí. The group was formed by former members of state police and the army, and its main enemies are the Cártel del Noreste and Los Metros. It is currently active.

country_links.evidence_quote: Los Ciclones had as their area of influence the US-Mexico border crossing between Matamoros and Brownsville, Texas .
country_links.context: Los Ciclones had as their area of influence the US-Mexico border crossing between Matamoros and Brownsville, Texas, indicating the organization operates in the United States.
